mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean returns when FEDFUNDS increases, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing above 4.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 65% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.0%, or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal spending and housing starts indicates broad-based domestic demand growth, which drives corporate revenue expectations higher and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns when RSAFS and HOUST both rise, or the interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply chain efficiency, which boosts corporate profit margins and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration yields negative or flat 20-day forward returns during tightening periods, or the predictive power vanishes when CPIAUCSL exceeds 3.5% year-over-year.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls demonstrate robust employment growth, which supports consumer expenditure and corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth consistently coincides with negative 5-day SPX returns, or the signal Rank IC falls below 0.01 across all tested rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly inflation readings above 0.4% force central banks to maintain restrictive policy stances, which suppresses equity valuations and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 60-day returns in more than 70% of months where CPIAUCSL rises by more than 0.4%, or the threshold effect disappears in out-of-sample validation.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real GDP and real personal spending confirms synchronized macroeconomic expansion, which elevates equity risk premiums and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined GDPC1 and RSAFS growth signal predicts negative 20-day returns, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a late-cycle expansion signals manufacturing contraction and weakening business investment, which triggers immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during late-cycle phases are followed by positive 5-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or the signal fails to achieve statistical significance in regime-filtered backtests.
